durable_improvement: The primary Cloudflare deployment workflow now runs promotion-consistency validation before final evidence manifest creation and retains the verdict in the atomic artifact upload set.

status_checks.unrelated_vercel_checks: five build-rate-limit failures observed; not evidence about Cloudflare behavior

privacy_boundary: Contains repository paths, commit identifiers, workflow control flow, and bounded verification statements only. No secrets, private chat, health material, diagnosis, or treatment claims.
claim_limit: Source inspection proves workflow ordering and artifact inclusion only. It does not prove execution, Cloudflare authorization, hostname resolution, deployment success, scientific truth, diagnosis, or treatment efficacy.
